side_effects.description: BPC causes stimulants (caffeine, DMAA, synephrine, ephedrine, yohimbine) to stop working; can sleep on 400mg caffeine while on BPC. Slight shakiness on stims but no wired feeling. After stopping BPC, 1-2 weeks later 100mg caffeine feels extremely potent.

protocol_notes: Speculates BPC affects neurotransmitters. After stopping BPC, stimulant sensitivity returns strongly within 1-2 weeks.
